zh.Uxelles, Jura, Franche-Comté, France: 法國福朗-可特艾尤拉武斯勒斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Vignory於1170年出生在法國福朗-可特艾尤拉武斯勒斯時，她的父親Barthélémy De Vignory30歲，母親Elvide de Brienne35歲。她於大約1185年與Henri II Gros de Brancion結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1228年之後。

zh-hans.Uxelles, Jura, Franche-Comté, France: 法国福朗-可特艾尤拉武斯勒斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice de Vignory于1170年出生在法国福朗-可特艾尤拉武斯勒斯时，她的父亲Barthélémy De Vignory30岁，母亲Elvide de Brienne35岁。她于大约1185年与Henri II Gros de Brancion结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1228年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Vignory was born in 1170, in Uxelles, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, her father, Barthélémy De Vignory, was 30 and her mother, Elvide de Brienne, was 35. She married Henri II Gros de Brancion about 1185. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died after 1228.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Vignory est née en 1170, à Uxelles, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, son père, Barthélémy De Vignory, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elvide de Brienne, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Henri II Gros de Brancion environ 1185. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée après 1228.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Vignory 1170 in Uxelles, Jura, Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Barthélémy De Vignory 30 und ihre Mutter Elvide de Brienne 35. Sie hat um 1185 Henri II Gros de Brancion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1228.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Vignory è nata il nel 1170 nel Uxelles, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Barthélémy De Vignory, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elvide de Brienne, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Henri II Gros de Brancion circa 1185. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il 1228.

ja.Martailly-lès-Brancion, Saône-et-Loire,: フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーマルティイリ-ルeス-ブランシオン

ja.Uxelles, Jura, Franche-Comté, France: フランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラウクセレス
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Vignoryが1170年にフランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラウクセレスで生まれた時，父Barthélémy De Vignoryは30歳，母Elvide de Brienneは35歳であった。約1185年にHenri II Gros de Brancionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1228年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Vignory(이)가 1170년 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 라 세레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Barthélémy De Vignory(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elvide de Brienne(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1185년 Henri II Gros de Brancion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Vignory nasceu em 1170, em Uxelles, Jura, Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Barthélémy De Vignory, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elvide de Brienne, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri II Gros de Brancion aproximadamente 1185. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1228.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Vignory родилась в 1170 г. в местности укселлесь, джура, фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Barthélémy De Vignory было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elvide de Brienne, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri II Gros de Brancion около 1185 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла после 1228 г.

sm.BET 1215 AND 1224: mai le 1215 e o'o I le 1224

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice de Vignory nació en 1170, en Uxelles, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Barthélémy De Vignory, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elvide de Brienne, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Henri II Gros de Brancion aproximadamente 1185. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió después de 1228.
